bundle.longDescription: Native desktop shell for the PointSav privategit development workbench. Loads the locally-running HTTP server in a native macOS window.

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: http://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self' data: http://127.0.0.1:*

_notes.tauri-version: v1.x — required for macOS 10.13 High Sierra. Upgrade to v2 when dev machine targets macOS 10.15+.
_notes.url-loading: index.html reads the configured port via __TAURI__.invoke('get_workbench_url') and navigates to it. The workbench HTTP server (app-privategit-workbench) must be running independently.
_notes.csp: Allows all localhost ports. Narrow to the specific port when the workbench port is fixed.
_notes.icons: Copy icons from app-workplace-memo/src-tauri/icons/ before first macOS build.
